title: Smoker Finds Luffy
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on smoker finds luffy, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Smoker Finds Luffy. Luffy runs into both Marines and his brother Ace in Nanohana, turning the Alabasta arrival into a chaotic reunion. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: As long as I'm a marine,

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: And you're a pirate, that is...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Well, let's see what ya got.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Finally a restau- rant! I'm starving!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Umm... You might... want to run for it, kid.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Damn, the food here is great!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Damn it... Who was that punk!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Pardon me for intruding during your meal.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So you did come to this country, after all...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Can't you stop eating for just one second?
